A U.S. dollar credit card can be a useful tool for Canadians who pay for goods and services in the U.S. Here are some reasons to consider the CIBC U.S. Dollar Aventura Gold Visa Card: You travel to the U.S. You’re a freelancer and work on projects in the U.S. You make work-related or personal purchases from U.S. retailers and vendors You have a U.S. dollar bank account You live in the U.S. for a portion of the year Did you know? You can enjoy an annual fee rebate on the CIBC U.S. Dollar Aventura Gold Visa Card if you have a CIBC US$ Personal Account or CIBC Bank USA Smart Account, and a premium CIBC personal credit card. Learn more about our cross-border banking options Can I combine the points from my CIBC U.S. Dollar Aventura Gold Visa Card with another Aventura credit card? Yes, if you’re the primary cardholder for both accounts. To transfer Aventura Points between your CIBC U.S. Dollar Aventura Gold Visa Card and other Aventura personal and business products, sign on to CIBC Rewards Opens in a new window. ⓘ . I already use my Canadian credit card when I travel to the U.S. or shop at U.S. retailers. What's the benefit of a U.S. dollar credit card? When you use your CIBC U.S. Dollar Aventura Gold Visa Card to make purchases in U.S. dollars, you don’t pay currency conversion fees. You’re charged in USD and pay in USD. ⓘ But, if you use your Canadian credit card, you pay a foreign currency conversion fee of 2.5%. Review section 5 of your Cardholder Agreement for details. What should I do if I'm asked for a zip code when I try to use my credit card at U.S. gas stations? Most U.S. gas stations need a ZIP code when paying at the pump with a credit card. Follow 3 simple steps to pay at the pump: Take the 3 numbers from your Canadian postal code (For example, 501) Add 2 zeroes at the end (For example, 501 + 00) Use this number at gas stations that need a U.S. zip code (For example, 50100) Can I use my CIBC U.S. Dollar Aventura Gold Visa outside the U.S.? Yes. You can use your card outside the U.S., including Canada. But, currency conversion fees will apply to your transactions. How do I make a payment to my CIBC U.S. Dollar Aventura Gold Visa Card? Pay your credit card online from your CIBC Canadian chequing or savings accounts or from your CIBC US$ Personal Account. When you pay from a CIBC U.S. dollar bank account, you’ll save the conversion fee since your payments are in U.S. dollars. Learn more about opening a CIBC U.S. bank account popupresult

Follow 3 simple steps to pay at the pump: Take the 3 numbers from your Canadian postal code (For example, 501) Add 2 zeroes at the end (For example, 501 + 00) Use this number at gas stations that need a U.S. zip code (For example, 50100) Can I use my CIBC U.S. Dollar Aventura Gold Visa outside the U.S.? Yes. You can use your card outside the U.S., including Canada. But, currency conversion fees will apply to your transactions. How do I make a payment to my CIBC U.S. Dollar Aventura Gold Visa Card? Pay your credit card online from your CIBC Canadian chequing or savings accounts or from your CIBC US$ Personal Account. Your CIBC Costco Business Mastercard questions answered Membership and documentation Can I use the same Costco membership to apply for both a CIBC Costco Business Mastercard and a CIBC Costco Mastercard? Yes. Both credit cards can be linked to your one Costco membership. Will I be charged for two Costco memberships if I apply for a CIBC Costco Business Mastercard and I already have a CIBC Costco Mastercard? Costco manages your Costco membership payments. If you have two CIBC Costco Mastercard credit cards that are linked to the same Costco membership, you will only be billed once, in accordance with Costco Membership Conditions and Regulations. If you would like to change how you are billed, please visit the Membership Desk at your local Costco warehouse, including business centres, or for more information, visit Costco Membership Conditions and Regulations Opens in a new window. . I own more than one business and have a Business Membership at Costco for each of those businesses. Can I have more than one CIBC Costco Business Mastercard? Yes. You may have a CIBC Costco Business Mastercard for each different membership you have with Costco. Why do I need to provide business documentation to apply for this card when I am sharing my personal income and consenting to my personal credit bureau check? CIBC requires certain documentation for all business credit cards as part of the application process in order to comply with our policies and regulatory requirements. Why do I need to provide business documentation when I already provided my business name when I bought my Business Membership at Costco? CIBC requires certain documentation for all business credit cards as part of the application process in order to comply with our policies and regulatory requirements. Cash back and cash back gift certificates Does the CIBC Costco Business Mastercard offer more cash back than the CIBC Costco Mastercard? The business card offers additional cash back categories that are not available on the personal card: 2% on purchases made through Costcobusinesscentre.ca 2% on shipping costs, for example when you use your card to courier packages or at Canada Post 2% on eligible insurance services, such as transactions categorized by Mastercard as “professional services” For more information on cash back Terms and Conditions, please check the Benefits Guide (PDF, 795 KB) Opens in a new window. . How many gift certificates will I receive if I have both a CIBC Costco Business Mastercard and a CIBC Costco Mastercard? If you're the Primary Cardholder of both credit cards, you'll be eligible to receive one cash back gift certificate for each credit card account. You'll receive your gift certificates in the January statement of each account, in accordance with the Cash Back Rewards Program Terms and Conditions. Your account must be open and in good standing on December 31 in order to receive the gift certificate the following January. Each gift certificate will show the last 4 digits of the relevant credit card account for reference. For more information, visit Costco cash back gift certificates . How does my cash back balance and gift certificate work if I have both a CIBC Costco Business Mastercard and a CIBC Costco Mastercard? Each CIBC Costco Mastercard will have its own cash back balance and the Primary Cardholder of each credit card account will be eligible to receive a separate cash back gift certificate for each account. Your cash back balance will appear each month on the first page of your credit card statement. You can also track your current cash back balance through the CIBC Mobile Banking ® App or CIBC Online Banking ® . Learn more about accessing your cash back balance and gift certificate Can I redeem my CIBC Costco Business Mastercard cash back gift certificate at Costco even if I'm using a different method of payment? Yes. Your gift certificate can be redeemed at any Canadian location even if you are using a different method of payment for the redemption purchase. Card transfers Can I transfer from my current personal CIBC credit card to the CIBC Costco Business Mastercard? Personal CIBC credit cards are not eligible to be transferred into the CIBC Costco Business Mastercard. Please start a new application for a CIBC Costco Business Mastercard. Can I transfer my existing CIBC Business Visa credit card into CIBC Costco Business Mastercard? Any CIBC personal liability business credit card is eligible to be transferred into the CIBC Costco Business Mastercard. Eligibility for a personal liability business credit card is based on personal finances and credit worthiness. You must have a valid Costco membership to apply for a CIBC Costco Business Mastercard. Transfers are subject to CIBC’s adjudication policies. popupresult
